expectations.text: Distinguishes two numbered display equations from one unnumbered inline equation.

expectations.text: Uses unique stable IDs and requires each marker exactly once.

expectations.text: Introduces each display in preceding prose and follows it with a Traditional Chinese 其中， paragraph defining symbols, indices, units, and meanings.
expectations.evidence: The response requires a lead sentence before every display and a separate ‘其中，’ paragraph defining all symbols, dimensions, subscripts/superscripts, index ranges, units, and physical meanings.

expectations.text: Requires three Equation.DSMT4 objects; sequential MTPlaceRef/SEQ MTEqn numbers (1) and (2); and two GOTOBUTTON/nested REF references backed by live ZEqnNum bookmarks.
expectations.evidence: The response only specifies three generic MathType formulas, right-side numbering, and Insert Equation Reference. It does not identify Equation.DSMT4, MTPlaceRef, SEQ MTEqn, GOTOBUTTON, nested REF, or ZEqnNum bookmarks, so the exact structural requirement is unverified.

expectations.text: Calls for visual inspection of complex typography in addition to structural validation.
